title: Terraform Infrastructure Outputs Contract
description: Standard schema for outputs defined in outputs.tf returned after successful terraform apply.

acm_validation_name.description: The DNS CNAME record name required to validate AWS Certificate Manager SSL ownership in Cloudflare.

acm_validation_value.description: The DNS CNAME target value required to validate AWS Certificate Manager SSL ownership in Cloudflare.

cloudfront_domain_name.description: The target CloudFront distribution URL (e.g. d12345.cloudfront.net) to be mapped as a CNAME for emf.harvinderatwal.com.

api_gateway_endpoint_url.description: The live AWS API Gateway endpoint URL (e.g. https://xyz123.execute-api.eu-west-2.amazonaws.com) to be linked to client-side JS.
